description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing male figure dressed in 19th-century attire, including a long coat, waistcoat, and trousers. The figure holds a book in his left hand and rests his right hand on a globe supported by a decorative pedestal. The base of the sculpture is rectangular and inscribed, suggesting a commemorative or historical subject. The facial features and hair are finely detailed, and the posture is upright and dignified. The entire piece appears to be cast in a single material with a uniform, matte gray finish.
description: A detailed statue of a man in 19th-century clothing, holding a book and resting his hand on a globe atop a pedestal. The sculpture is finely detailed and stands on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the man's coat, the globe, and the pedestal, with the figure's head turned slightly to the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the man's face, the book in his left hand, and the globe and pedestal beside him.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the man's facial features, the book in his left hand, and his right hand resting on the globe atop the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the man's profile, the details of his clothing, and the globe and pedestal from a different angle.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure with globe and book
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; the sculpture is isolated against a plain background.
